raw_title: Performative Propaganda Engagement: How Celebrity Fans Engage with State Propaganda on Weibo
title_en: Performative Propaganda Engagement: How Celebrity Fans Engage with State Propaganda on Weibo
title_zh: 表演性宣传参与：名人粉丝如何在微博上与国家宣传互动
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究探讨了名人粉丝在微博上如何参与国家宣传内容。它关注粉丝们可能为了展示忠诚或支持而进行的表演性互动行为，而不是出于真正的政治信念。
plain_summary_en: This research examines how celebrity fans engage with state propaganda content on Weibo. It focuses on the performative interactions fans might undertake to demonstrate loyalty or support, rather than genuine political belief.
research_direction_zh: 社交媒体时代政治传播与粉丝文化的交叉研究，特别关注数字平台上的国家宣传与公众参与机制。
research_direction_en: Research at the intersection of political communication and fan culture in the social media era, particularly focusing on state propaganda and public engagement mechanisms on digital platforms.
